info.title: AcceptMission
info.description:
Accept Mission AI-Powered Innovation Platform

Unlock the full potential of innovation directly within your Power Platform apps and flows using the Accept Mission custom connector. This connector allows you to seamlessly integrate with Accept Mission's AI-driven innovation software to launch idea campaigns, collect and manage ideas, and streamline innovation workflows.
